data.title: Hack Attack: Krispy Kreme Faces Cyber Incident, Digital Sales Suffer Blow
data.description: Krispy Kreme's stock falls after a cyber incident disrupts online ordering, though in-person sales and partner deliveries remain unaffected.

data.title: Bitcoin's Next Move: $105,000 Or $85,000? Poll Finds Over 60% Say…

data.title: $1000 Invested In Johnson Controls Intl 15 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
Match Group Faces Investor Scrutiny Over Tinder Woes, Hinge Expansion Plans
data.description: Match Group faces high expectations for its investor meeting as Wall Street awaits its turnaround plan for Tinder, which has been struggling since 2023.

data.title: Dental Product Supplier Patterson Companies Goes Private In $4.1 Billion Deal
data.description: Patient Square Capital to acquire Patterson Companies for $4.1B. The deal is set to close in fiscal Q4 2025, taking the company private.
